'''âp-j-g-j''' ('''kapajgejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:centralize|centralize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-j-g-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:centralize|centralize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-j-g-j
|-
! Lemma
| kapajgejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipajgejoko|thipajgejoko]] || [[word:jipajgejoko|jipajgejoko]] || [[word:shipajgejoko|shipajgejoko]] || [[word:kipajgejoko|kipajgejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupajgejoko|thuthupajgejoko]] || [[word:jujupajgejoko|jujupajgejoko]] || [[word:shushupajgejoko|shushupajgejoko]] || [[word:kukupajgejoko|kukupajgejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupajgejoko|thupajgejoko]] || [[word:jupajgejoko|jupajgejoko]] || [[word:shupajgejoko|shupajgejoko]] || [[word:kupajgejoko|kupajgejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupajgejoko|thupajgejoko]] || [[word:jupajgejoko|jupajgejoko]] || [[word:shupajgejoko|shupajgejoko]] || [[word:kupajgejoko|kupajgejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepajgejoko|thepajgejoko]] || [[word:jepajgejoko|jepajgejoko]] || [[word:shepajgejoko|shepajgejoko]] || [[word:kepajgejoko|kepajgejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopajgejoko|thothopajgejoko]] || [[word:jojopajgejoko|jojopajgejoko]] || [[word:shoshopajgejoko|shoshopajgejoko]] || [[word:kokopajgejoko|kokopajgejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopajgejoko|thopajgejoko]] || [[word:jopajgejoko|jopajgejoko]] || [[word:shopajgejoko|shopajgejoko]] || [[word:kopajgejoko|kopajgejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopajgejoko|thopajgejoko]] || [[word:jopajgejoko|jopajgejoko]] || [[word:shopajgejoko|shopajgejoko]] || [[word:kopajgejoko|kopajgejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpajgejoko|thĂŠpajgejoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpajgejoko|jĂŠpajgejoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpajgejoko|shĂŠpajgejoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpajgejoko|kĂŠpajgejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapajgejoko|thathapajgejoko]] || [[word:jajapajgejoko|jajapajgejoko]] || [[word:shashapajgejoko|shashapajgejoko]] || [[word:kakapajgejoko|kakapajgejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapajgejoko|thapajgejoko]] || [[word:japajgejoko|japajgejoko]] || [[word:shapajgejoko|shapajgejoko]] || [[word:kapajgejoko|kapajgejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapajgejoko|thapajgejoko]] || [[word:japajgejoko|japajgejoko]] || [[word:shapajgejoko|shapajgejoko]] || [[word:kapajgejoko|kapajgejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shapajgejithi|shapajgejithi]] || [[word:shapajgejiji|shapajgejiji]] || [[word:shapajgejishi|shapajgejishi]] || [[word:shapajgejiki|shapajgejiki]]
